title: Extremely Visible Powdered Snow
description: A texture pack that makes powdered snow blocks extremely easy to see.
body:
## greenishlemon's EXTREMELY visible powdered snow
- This pack puts a red outline and a red exclamation point (❗) on all powdered snow blocks.
- This pack also adds a red outline to the snow in the powdered snow bucket.

I hope this helps some people.  See the [gallery ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visible-p-snow/gallery) for some examples of what this pack does.
